Headline: Harlem-bound Green and 54th/Cermak-bound Pink Line Service Delayed at Morgan
ShortDescription: Harlem-bound Green and 54th/Cermak-bound Pink Line Services Line trains are standing at Morgan due to a sick customer. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Harlem-bound Green and 54th/Cermak-bound Pink Line Services Line trains are standing at Morgan due to a sick customer.

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines.

These may include:

#20 Madison

Shuttle buses have been requested to provide connecting service between:

Green Line: Harlem/Lake -  Clark/Lake (Northbound)

Pink Line: 54th/Cermak - Polk - Clark/Lake (Eastbound)

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
